title: sideritis lurida subsp. relegata
intro: Sideritis lurida subsp. relegata is a subspecies of the Sideritis lurida plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is also known as the "Rockrose" and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The Sideritis lurida subsp. relegata plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
